tagline: Workspace instructions for chat in Genie One: Workspace admins can now create a /Workspace/.genie workspace instructions.md file to add custom instructions that apply to all chat conversations in…
what_it_does: Workspace instructions for chat in Genie One: Workspace admins can now create a /Workspace/.genie workspace instructions.md file to add custom instructions that apply to all chat conversations in the workspace. Atlassian and Glean MCP connections (Beta): You can now connect chat in Genie One to the Atlassian and Glean MCPs from within the chat box. Server sent events support (Public Preview): Externally hosted MCP servers that use server sent events are now supported.
why_it_matters: This generates more accurate responses and reduces latency by reducing the amount of data Genie One needs to crawl and query.
